stemHtml: What is the appropriate course of action if, before a flight, you notice that a crew member shows signs of alcoholism?

options.a: Alcohol misuse renders the crew member "unfit to fly" until they are deemed recovered by a medical professional.
options.b: The pre-flight briefing should include instructions to minimize work interaction with the affected crew member during the flight to reduce the risk of errors.
options.c: Small amounts of alcohol may help the crew member relax and improve their performance during the flight.
options.d: Alcohol misuse renders the crew member "unfit to fly" until they have completely sobered up after sleeping.
